name: 3-Snap Flip Shield
product_features:
• Optically correct
  • Anti-scratch adjustable universal fit
  • Use with open face or half helmets
  • Excellent impact strength
  • Multi-position ratchet adjustable shield
  • Lock-down riding position

name: Flo Stainless Steel Oil Filter
product_features:
• Reusable filters made from type 304 stainless steel micronic filter cloth
  • Filters down to 35 microns
  • Maintains consistent flow under all conditions including cold start ups, the presence of water, and extreme heat (up to 600 degrees)
  • Anodized aluminum housing looks great and helps dissipate heat

name: RTG Sealed Chain
product_features:
• Utilizes Sunstar's exclusive TG-ring (TripleGuard) where the ring seals with 3 lips per side for the ultimate in heat prevention and keeping the chain lubricated even in extremely harsh conditions
  • The 520RTG1 is the perfect choice for racing / performance oriented applications with 520 chain size. With a tensile strength of 9900 lbs, the 530RTG1 is intended for the large displacement sport machines like Ninja 1400, GSX1300R Hayabusas and others
  • Color option: Gold
  • Uses rivet type connecting link

name: BATTERY Y50-N18L-A2
description:
Powerful starting power at a great price!
Parts Unlimited Heavy-Duty batteries are built to the same exacting specifications and quality-control standards as OEM
Rugged and provide more cranking power over standard batteries
Lead calcium alloy reduces water loss and service by 66% compared to standard batteries
Includes anti-sulfation chemical formulated to reduce sulfate crystal buildup on the battery plates
Reduces self-discharge for longer time between charges
Fiberglass separators improve acid flow
Kit includes battery, pre-measured acid pack, red filler tube, hardware kit and clear vent tube

name: Coolant
product_features:
• Waterless Coolant for all Power Sport Vehicles
  • Specifications; boiling point above 375 degree F. freezing properties below -40 degrees F.
  • Unbeatable protection against corrosion and electrolysis
  • Last the life of the engine
  • Low toxicity
  • Improves combustion and maximizes horse power by preventing boil-over
